title: How One Family Fooled the World into Buying Worthless Rocks
description:
Take a look at this. Beautiful, rare, and absolutely priceless.

This is the dark business history behind The De Beers diamond cartel, artificial scarcity, and marketing scams.

Subscribe to Shadow Empires for more corporate scandals, hidden monopolies, and stories of power gone wrong.

title: The Poisoned Formula: The Corporate Giant That Stole Africa's Markets
description:
In the mid-1970s, one food conglomerate launched a sales campaign so aggressive it led to thousands of infant deaths. Operating far from public scrutiny, they targeted some of the poorest, most vulnerable populations on Earth.

This is the dark business history behind Nestlé's aggressive baby formula campaign in developing nations.

Subscribe to Shadow Empires for more corporate scandals, hidden monopolies, and stories of power gone wrong.

title: The Secret Society That Controlled the World's Electricity
description:
In the winter of 1924, far from the public eye, a group of powerful industrialists quietly gathered in a smoke-filled room in Geneva, Switzerland. Representing the world's leading lighting conglomerates, these men were not there to celebrate innovation.

This is the dark business history behind The Phoebus Cartel, planned obsolescence, and lightbulb conspiracies.

Subscribe to Shadow Empires for more corporate scandals, hidden monopolies, and stories of power gone wrong.

title: The Billion-Dollar Poison: How America's Sweetest Brand Fooled a Generation
description:
For decades, the public was told that fat was the enemy. But behind the scenes, the sugar industry helped shape the science, the headlines, and the food choices of an entire generation. This is the dark history of how corporate influence rewired America's diet.

Subscribe to Shadow Empires for more dark business history and corporate scandals.

title: The Company That Literally Conquered India (and Went Bankrupt)
description:
It had its own army of 260,000 men. It ruled over more people than most kings.

This is the dark business history behind The rise and fall of the East India Company.
